metadata.description: Agent skill pack for human-cli — teaches Claude Code and other skill-aware agents how to drive human-cli (vision, image gen, speech, reasoning)

plugins.name: human
plugins.description: Teaches AI agents to use human-cli: the 26-tool terminal-native CLI for vision, image generation, speech synthesis, and structured reasoning (eyes/hands/mouth/brain). Triggers on image analysis, PDF summarization, image generation and editing, text-to-speech, narration, reasoning frameworks, and reflection.
